summary: Manual carrier-only closeout review approved GH-170 closeout carrier head c197c6b97d24b6a8ebdabd0c5fb7700b80c3204c. This review covers only terminal metadata consumption for PR #176, issue #170 closeout evidence, `.loom/status/current.md` idle pointer, and `.loom/bootstrap/init-result.json` idle fact-chain entry. It does not approve new product behavior, GH-171 fidelity QA, Stage 5, live owner-runtime integration, or final real data contracts. Post-review drift after this record must remain limited to GH-170 review carriers.
